sections.title: Marina lifestyle
paragraphs: The marina precinct connects residential towers with waterfront walks, F&B, and leisure boating culture. Owners marketing units highlight bay views and walkable amenities.
Overseas landlords should understand seasonal visitor flows and maintenance exposure for waterfront-facing units — inspection reports help monitor balcony hardware and glazing.

faq.a: Bay and marina views typically command higher rents; confirm by building and floor.
